form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (24.22) at Rockhampton over 407m. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.71) in a Mix 5, finishing a 9 length eighth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 11 starts. Key chance and should go close.
